prompt: A favicon icon, 1024x1024. The letters 'IV' in a bold monospace font (like JetBrains Mono Bold or IBM Plex Mono Bold) in bright green (#9ece6a) centered on a pure black background (#08080c). The letters should be large, filling most of the square canvas. Clean, crisp edges, no gradients, no effects, no serifs. Simple typographic icon. Must be legible at 16x16 pixels. Only the letters IV, nothing else.
